text: RCU Calculation @ tmstteansanitin - @ sarararc If you need to retrieve 10 ITEMS per second ... 2.5K average size Calculate RCU per item ... ROUND UP (ITEM SIZE / 4 KB) (1) Multiply by average read ops per second (10) = Strongly Consistent RCU Required (10) (50% of strongly consistent) = Eventually Consistent RCU Required (5)
